repo_state.head_message: fix(core): architecture hardening — cache atomicity, coordination bugs, lifecycle gating, placeholder tools, reporting audit
repo_state.note: ~164 modified files, ~60+ untracked (docs/json/ artifacts from prior sessions). Clean new artifacts from this session.

what_to_do_next: Execute the P0 and P1 fixes identified in the bug ledger. The campaign should shift from discovery to repair.

top_10_repairs.summary: Delete crash lock in will-quit handler
top_10_repairs.evidence: Line 294 writes crashLock. No code deletes it. Every restart after crash enters safe mode forever.

top_10_repairs.summary: Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in production SQLite
top_10_repairs.evidence: Production db init never runs PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON. Test code does at json-migration.test.ts:79. Cascade deletes are silent no-ops.
Module-level Map, two concurrent lock() calls both see get() undefined, both create semaphore, second set() overwrites. Use Ref.modify.
Lines 120-127: Effect.ensuring removes inflight entry BEFORE cache Ref.update at line 144. Race window for duplicate computation.

top_10_repairs.summary: Wire invalidation bus to file edit events
top_10_repairs.evidence: ContextInvalidationBus.notify() is only called from agent-facing tools (mark_context_stale, request_context_refresh). No code calls notify('file.edited') when files actually change. All context workers are dead code as a result.
test.ts never imports EventStore. smart-bun.ts only writes to analytics file. agent-queries.ts queries eventType='test_run' — no code produces this event. get_validation_context always returns null.

top_10_repairs.summary: Add try/catch around JSON.parse in comment-plan.ts
Add sanitizeEnv() call in PTY spawn
top_10_repairs.evidence: pty/index.ts:198 spreads ...process.env without sanitizeEnv(). cross-spawn-spawner.ts:109 does call it. PTY leaks API keys to every terminal.

top_10_repairs.summary: Prevent plugin tools from colliding with built-in names

known_blockers: Cannot run tests from repo root — 'do not run tests from root' guard. Need to cd packages/opencode and run 'bun test'.
DuckDB context projection VIEW and TABLE share name _ctx_file_relevance with different schemas — needs name split before ranking works.
Campaign state machine in campaign/ directory is speculative architecture — not wired into production execution.
lessons_transferred: invalidation-bus-dead-code: The invalidation bus was never wired to real file events — context workers subscribed to scopes never triggered by production code.
plugin-same-process-no-sandbox: All 5 critical plugin findings share one root cause — plugins run in-process with full host access.
validation-pipeline-disconnected: Test/validate results never recorded to EventStore; validation parser worker queries empty store.
